HOPE.SpendDialogText: Choose how to spend Hope on this roll.
HOPE.SpendAddLabel: Spend Hope to add +1 per point
HOPE.SpendRerollLabel: Spend 3 Hope to reroll this roll
HOPE.SpendNoHope: You do not have any Hope to spend.
HOPE.RerollUsedMessage: {name} uses 3 Hope to reroll this roll.
HOPE.MaxReachedMessage: {name} already has 5 Hope. Hope is reset to 1d4.
HOPE.Settings.MaxHope.Name: Maximum Hope
HOPE.Settings.MaxHope.Hint: The maximum amount of Hope a character can have before overflow occurs.
foundry-vtt-hope-actions.settings.showAw: Show chat Award Hope button on attack/save rolls
When enabled, attack roll and saving throw chat messages include an Award Hope button.
